name: Grayscale Horizen Trust (ZEN)
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Overview of the Trust and the Shares Grayscale Horizen Trust (ZEN) (formerly known as Horizen Investment Trust) (the Trust) is a Delaware Statutory Trust that was formed on July 3, 2018 by the filing of the Certificate of Trust with the Delaware Secretary of State in accordance with the provisions of the Delaware Statutory Trust Act. The Trusts purpose is to hold Horizen (ZEN). The Horizen Network was originally launched as an alternative software implementation of the B...
